LanguageData.VBE_DalgonaCoffeeHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in one's nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 15% amount and 15% reduction in rest fall rate. Cold coffee reduces heatstroke. Dalgona coffee provides a 10% research speed bonus.
LanguageData.VBE_DalgonaCoffeeHigh.label: dalgona coffee high
LanguageData.VBE_DrankBlackTea.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 20% and provides 15% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankBlackTea.label: drank black tea
LanguageData.VBE_DrankEarlGreyTea.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours. Earl grey tea provides a 10% research speed bonus.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankEarlGreyTea.label: drank earl grey tea
LanguageData.VBE_DrankKombuchaTea.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours. Kombucha tea reduces the effects of Diabetes if present. Kombucha acts as a home remedy against the flu, reducing its severity by 5%.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankKombuchaTea.label: drank kombucha tea
LanguageData.VBE_DrankLemonTea.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours. Lemon tea acts as a remedy against Gut Worms, increasing tending quality with each coffee drank.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankLemonTea.label: drank lemon tea
LanguageData.VBE_DrankMasalaChai.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours. Masala chai acts as a home remedy against wound infections, reducing the severity of a random infection by 5%.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankMasalaChai.label: drank masala chai
LanguageData.VBE_DrankMintTea.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours. Mint tea provides fresh breath, increasing social impact by 10%.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankMintTea.label: drank mint tea
LanguageData.VBE_DrankNoonChai.description: Tannins naturally found in tea once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as boosting ones immune system. Increases immunity gain speed by 15% and provides 10% reduction in rest fall rate for 5 hours. Used for treating muscle parasites.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankNoonChai.label: drank noon chai
LanguageData.VBE_IrishCoffeeHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in one's nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 16% amount and 16% reduction in rest fall rate. Increases global work speed by 16%. Hot coffee reduces hypothermia.
LanguageData.VBE_IrishCoffeeHigh.label: irish coffee high
LanguageData.VBE_LatteCoffeeHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in one's nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 18% amount and 18% reduction in rest fall rate. Latte coffee reduces hypothermia.
LanguageData.VBE_LatteCoffeeHigh.label: latte coffee high
LanguageData.VBE_LemonCoffeeHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in one's nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 15% amount and 15% reduction in rest fall rate. Hot coffee reduces hypothermia. Lemon coffee acts as a remedy against Gut Worms, increasing tending quality with each coffee drank.
LanguageData.VBE_LemonCoffeeHigh.label: lemon coffee high
LanguageData.VBE_MintCoffeeHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in one's nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 15% amount and 15% reduction in rest fall rate. Hot coffee reduces hypothermia. Mint coffee provides fresh breath, increasing social impact by 10%.
LanguageData.VBE_MintCoffeeHigh.label: mint coffee high
LanguageData.VBE_YuenYeungHigh.description: Caffeine naturally found in coffee once metabolised increases the stimuli in ones nervous system, suppressing ones urge to sleep, as well as clearing ones mind. Increases learning speed by a 15% amount and 13% reduction in rest fall rate. The tea in it increases immunity gain speed by 15%. Cold coffee reduces heatstroke.
LanguageData.VBE_YuenYeungHigh.label: yuenyeung high
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedMintLeaves.description: Consumed some fresh mint leaves. The fresh breath increases social impact by 10%.
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedMintLeaves.label: consumed mint (from meal)
